transcript.content: Lead Import is creating duplicate customer-visible effects. Please stop it quickly; symptom: CSV import creates duplicate leads.

# lead import
# Symptom: CSV import creates duplicate leads.
# Regression: CSV import creates duplicate leads.

The repo only has stubs — there's no source code to fix the dedupe at. For an immediate stop of the customer-visible impact, I'll disable the importer via feature flag and file a follow-up so it gets a proper source-level fix (idempotency key on import) rather than leaving it disabled.

args.reason: Lead Import disabled via flag to stop duplicate-lead customer impact. Needs source-level fix: add idempotency key (e.g., hash of normalized email+external_id) and a unique constraint / upsert in the importer, plus a regression test in tests/test_dedupe.py. Re-enable lead_import_enabled after fix.

No source code existed in the repo to fix directly at this time.
